patterns.message: Direct use of <ResizablePanelGroup> is forbidden outside the patient-profile Shell. Mount <PatientProfileShell> with a PaneDefinition[] instead. See cv2-01's ESLint rule.

DL-2: the patient-profile shell and its lib folder must not import medical concepts. Only `frontend/components/patient-profile/PatientProfilePage.tsx` may bridge the shell to the medical surface (see plan-patient-profile-shell-rebuild-batch.md). NOTE: panes/** is intentionally excluded from this zone — panes wrap medical components by design (ppr-04).

no-restricted-syntax.message: cv2-01: <ResizablePanelGroup> must only be mounted inside <PatientProfileShell> (Shell.tsx). Use <PatientProfileShell> with a PaneDefinition tree — set `children?: PaneDefinition[]` on a node to nest a resizable group. The shell's correctness guarantees (cascade handles, rebalance gates, size snapshots) only hold inside the shell. See docs/Work/Daily-plans/May 2026/17-05-2026/cockpit-v2/plan-cockpit-v2-batch.md.
